body:
Hey Amara — hope you're having a good start to May. I wanted to loop you in on a conversation we've been having internally at [Khosla Ventures](vc/khosla-ventures) around a few emerging climate infrastructure deals that seem to sit right at the intersection of your thesis. There's one company in particular — early-stage, strong technical founders, doing something genuinely novel in grid-edge storage optimization — that I think could be worth a joint look if you're open to co-investing. I know you've been heads-down on the [Halfway Capital](vc/halfway-capital) portfolio reviews this quarter, but wanted to flag it before we get too far down the diligence path. Would love to grab 30 minutes this week or next if you have any availability — even a quick call to gut-check whether the fit is there on your end. Let me know what works.

— Tomoko
